test-case.description: returns the resolved tag
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.returns the resolved tag

test-case.description: requests the latest release endpoint, not a specific tag
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.requests the latest release endpoint, not a specific tag

test-case.description: downloads specifically the lich-5.zip asset, not the tar.gz or the .exe
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.downloads specifically the lich-5.zip asset, not the tar.gz or the .exe

test-case.description: extracts into the parent of DestDir, not DestDir itself
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.extracts into the parent of DestDir, not DestDir itself

test-case.description: writes a lich-fetched.txt record containing the resolved tag
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.writes a lich-fetched.txt record containing the resolved tag

test-case.description: sets TLS 1.2 before the first network call
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.sets TLS 1.2 before the first network call

test-case.description: verifies the downloaded zip against the release-reported digest
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.verifies the downloaded zip against the release-reported digest

test-case.description: removes a pre-existing DestDir before extracting, so a stale install cannot linger
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.removes a pre-existing DestDir before extracting, so a stale install cannot linger

test-case.description: cleans up the downloaded zip after extraction
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.happy path.cleans up the downloaded zip after extraction

test-suite.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release has no lich-5.zip asset
test-suite.description: Invoke-LichFetch.the release has no lich-5.zip asset

test-case.description: throws naming the missing asset and the release tag
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release has no lich-5.zip asset.throws naming the missing asset and the release tag

test-case.description: never attempts a download once the asset is confirmed missing
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release has no lich-5.zip asset.never attempts a download once the asset is confirmed missing

test-suite.name: Invoke-LichFetch.extraction did not produce the expected DestDir
test-suite.description: Invoke-LichFetch.extraction did not produce the expected DestDir

test-case.description: throws rather than silently leaving the xcopy source empty
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.extraction did not produce the expected DestDir.throws rather than silently leaving the xcopy source empty

test-suite.name: Invoke-LichFetch.lich-5.zip digest does not match what was downloaded
test-suite.description: Invoke-LichFetch.lich-5.zip digest does not match what was downloaded

test-case.description: throws naming both digests, rather than extracting an unverified download
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.lich-5.zip digest does not match what was downloaded.throws naming both digests, rather than extracting an unverified download

test-case.description: never attempts extraction once the digest check fails
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.lich-5.zip digest does not match what was downloaded.never attempts extraction once the digest check fails

test-case.description: cleans up the mismatched download rather than leaving it on disk
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.lich-5.zip digest does not match what was downloaded.cleans up the mismatched download rather than leaving it on disk

test-suite.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release reports no digest for lich-5.zip
test-suite.description: Invoke-LichFetch.the release reports no digest for lich-5.zip

test-case.description: throws rather than installing an unverifiable download
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release reports no digest for lich-5.zip.throws rather than installing an unverifiable download

test-case.description: never attempts extraction once the digest is confirmed missing
test-case.name: Invoke-LichFetch.the release reports no digest for lich-5.zip.never attempts extraction once the digest is confirmed missing

test-case.description: downloads, verifies, and returns the destination path when the digest matches
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.happy path.downloads, verifies, and returns the destination path when the digest matches

test-case.description: passes the given TimeoutSec through to Invoke-WebRequest
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.happy path.passes the given TimeoutSec through to Invoke-WebRequest

test-case.description: throws before ever attempting a download
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.malformed ExpectedDigest.throws before ever attempting a download

test-case.description: rejects an empty string via the Mandatory parameter binding itself
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.malformed ExpectedDigest.rejects an empty string via the Mandatory parameter binding itself

test-case.description: throws and deletes the downloaded file, never returning a path
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.digest mismatch.throws and deletes the downloaded file, never returning a path

test-case.description: throws when the destination file was never created
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.download failure.throws when the destination file was never created

test-case.description: cleans up a partial file left behind by a transport failure mid-download
test-case.name: Invoke-VerifiedDownload.download failure.cleans up a partial file left behind by a transport failure mid-download
